subject: grx011_ssao_blur_real_pass_enablement_smoke
known_gaps: math parity is CPU-proven for the MODE_SMART single-pass single-slice edge-aware cross blur subset only and still pending GPU observation (math_parity_evidence.json status=pending_gpu_dispatch); MODE_WIDE, MODE_NON_SMART, the multi-pass ping-pong chain, the 4-slice deinterleaved loop, SSIL blur, mirror-sampler border addressing, and rg8 unorm storage quantization are recorded gaps

canonical artifact provenance is hlsl_bridge_workaround (owner-approved GRX-009 texture artifact provenance policy): the DXIL container is DXC-compiled from artifacts/hlsl_bridge/ssao_blur_smart.hlsl, not rurixc-owned; a rurixc-owned texture-capable compile still requires a patched llc that supports texture intrinsics plus multi-channel texture element support

the real dispatch path is linked only under the d3d12-recording-shim feature; the shipping feature-off bridge still fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked, and the patch 0016 result writeback is a SCAFFOLD: the native Godot SSAO blur re-renders every frame as the continuation/backstop (raster/compute output seam and full-mode parity are later rounds)
note: GRX-011 ssao_blur gated real-pass enablement gate evidence. The opt-in real-pass arm (dispatch_real_pass, default false) runs against the texture-capable hlsl_bridge workaround canonical package (per-slot texture2d/rwtexture2d binding kinds, owner-approved hlsl_bridge_workaround provenance, MODE_SMART edge-aware blur math parity CPU-proven pending GPU) and a d3d12-recording-shim bridge DLL, so every software gate can pass and a real recorded dispatch may return RXGD_STATUS_OK; when the dispatch cannot complete the gate reports first_missing_prerequisite=real_dispatch_recording_failed instead of claiming success. The patch 0016 result writeback is a SCAFFOLD (native Godot SSAO blur stays the continuation/backstop), default_enable_state stays disabled, and no performance, FPS, or GPU-timestamp claim is made.

dll_fingerprint.feature_note: Bridge built WITH the d3d12-recording-shim feature: the ssao_blur real-pass arm routes through the linked recording shim, so arming RXGD_CAP_SSAO_BLUR_REAL_PASS can make rxgd_record_pass return RXGD_STATUS_OK only after a real recorded dispatch. The shipping feature-off bridge still fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked. target/debug/rurix_godot.dll is a mutable build artifact.

godot_exe_fingerprint.scratch_build_note: Scratch Godot build binaries are NOT committed to the repo. This console exe is a local, gitignored artifact rebuilt from the ignored external/godot-master snapshot with the full 0001..0016 GRX-011 patch stack applied (module_rurix_accel_enabled=yes d3d12=yes). Only its fingerprint is recorded here so the measured evidence stays auditable; re-point RURIX_GRX011_SSAO_BLUR_GODOT_EXE at an equivalent rebuild to reproduce it.

build.command: H:\rurix\target\grx\scons-venv\Scripts\python.exe -m SCons platform=windows target=template_debug d3d12=yes module_rurix_accel_enabled=yes disable_path_overrides=no num_jobs=1 verbose=yes angle=no silence_msvc=no

forced_capability_downgrade.bridge_fallback_marker_line: RurixAccel: ssao_blur native resource handle mapping fallback rc=1; Godot native SSAO blur path remains active.

allowed_godot_errors.message: Could not load global script cache
allowed_godot_errors.rationale: Tolerated Godot global script cache shutdown/cache warning in the generated minimal smoke project; it does not indicate runtime bridge recording failure when the process exits 0 and recording checks pass.

visual.frame_artifact_note: Frame artifacts live in the local work dir and are hash-pinned here; they are committed under artifacts/visual/ ONLY on a strict status=success run.

fallback_telemetry.bridge_fallback_marker: RurixAccel: ssao_blur native resource handle mapping fallback rc=

success_evidence_note: Historical measured success artifact for the GRX-011 ssao_blur real-pass enablement gate. It is written ONLY on a strict status=success run (opt-in real dispatch executed AND completed AND the LDR visual gate stayed within thresholds AND every audit passed) and is never deleted or overwritten by a later SKIP/FAIL run. Even this success keeps default_enable_state=disabled and performance_claim=none.
